metadata.task_title: Adding an image to a PowerPoint Presentation Slide
metadata.instruction: Add the photo Task ID 62.jpg to Task ID 62.pptx, both in Document > Task 62 folder.
metadata.context: I want to add a picture of myself to the presentation

l3.rationale: Moved the pointer over the File Explorer window.

l4.rationale: Used File Explorer to open Documents and then the Task 62 folder, reaching the task files.

l5.rationale: Folder navigation and canvas confirmation open Task 62.pptx before editing.
